Article: Eva Unit 04 whats up with that
[]: Eva Unit 04: what's up with that?! Post by Kiel » Tue Jul 06, 2004 7:43 pm Alright, I understand Evas 00 to 03, but it's 04 that's really got me stumped. It was "destroyed" in the explosion of the US Nerv branch, that much i get, but I'd like to at least know what it looks like... am I right, here? :roll: Also, was Eva 04 designed to be piloted by the fifth child, Nagisa? I was wondering because every picture or clip I've seen with him near an eva consists of Kaworu and either one of the mass production Evas or Unit 02! Maybe I'm just off on a rant here, but I'd like at least some more info about the infamous unit 04, maybe even a pic if anyone can spare one I GOTS TA KNOW!!!! well, maybe not that bad... Arigato :)

[]: Post by Asuka Langley » Tue Jul 06, 2004 8:28 pm I think that Eva Unit-04 looked something like Eva 03, but it was silver instead of darkblue/black. Let me see if I can find you a link. Ah, okay. Go here to see what it looks like. Hope that helps a bit.

[]: Post by EVA-01X » Tue Jul 06, 2004 8:38 pm Since you probably can't read that German print Evangelion Unit 04 was designed for combat like Unit-03 but was sidetracked in the US to test the first S2 engine. Then as you know it went kerblooie. Various fanfics have used though (EVA-R, Higher Learning and several others as well)

[]: Post by MongolSquad » Tue Jul 06, 2004 8:42 pm Notice how the color scheme for Eva-04 is very similar to the Mass Production Evas. I beleive it was a prelude to the MP Evas.

[]: Post by V » Mon Oct 15, 2007 8:32 am Official production drawings by Gainax show that Eva 04 was Eva 03's sister unit, so it was physically identical to Eva 03, but painted silver (chrome) instead of black. *****No, it was not intented for Kaworu. Quite simply, Eva 03 didn't have a pilot yet. Just as Eva 01 physically existed long before Shinji was officially picked as a pilot, as the "Third Child"......well Toji, only AFTER the destruction of Eva 04, was designated as the Fourth Child (Kaworu was the Fifth Child). So it would appear that they simply didn't pick a pilot yet because it was still under construction.
